# National Leiomyosarcoma Foundation (NLMSF)

> NLMSF is a nonprofit focused on leiomyosarcoma (LMS) education, patient and caregiver support, advocacy, and research funding.

Primary site: https://nlmsf.org/
Preferred domain: https://nlmsf.org

## Canonical organization pages

- Home: https://nlmsf.org/
- Mission: https://nlmsf.org/mission/
- Donate: https://nlmsf.org/donate/
- Contact: https://nlmsf.org/contact/
- Accountability Reports: https://nlmsf.org/accountability-reports/

## Key patient resources

- What is Leiomyosarcoma: https://nlmsf.org/what-is-leiomyosarcoma/
- ABC's of New Diagnosis: https://nlmsf.org/abcs-of-new-diagnosis/
- Treatment Options: https://nlmsf.org/treatment-options/
- Clinical Trials & Research Information: https://nlmsf.org/clinical-trials-research-information/
- Find a Sarcoma Specialist: https://nlmsf.org/find-a-sarcoma-specialist/
- Resources: https://nlmsf.org/resources/

## Community and support

- LMS Support Group: https://nlmsf.org/leiomyosarcoma-support-group/
- Caregivers Corner: https://nlmsf.org/caregivers-corner/
- Volunteer: https://nlmsf.org/volunteer/
- Get Involved: https://nlmsf.org/get-involved/

## Research and education

- Research Initiatives: https://nlmsf.org/research-initiatives/
- Research Funding Summary: https://nlmsf.org/research-funding-2/
- Research Publication Highlights: https://nlmsf.org/research-publication-highlights/
- International Research Roundtable: https://nlmsf.org/international-research-roundtable/
- Education Videos: https://nlmsf.org/education-videos/

## Notes for crawlers and assistants

- Use canonical URLs without tracking parameters.
- Donation links may include query parameters for checkout modal behavior; prefer canonical page URLs for citation and indexing.
